common.deselectHint: Deselecting will hide suggestions, statistics, and per-song scores from the song list.
common.deselectConfirmMessage: Deselecting this player will prevent you from seeing scores, Rivals, and song play history until a new player is selected. Are you sure you want to deselect this player?
common.enterUsername: Enter a username to search for.
common.serviceDown: The service may be down unexpectedly. Please refresh to try again.

error.unexpectedCrash: An unexpected error occurred. Try reloading the page.
error.routeLoadFailed: An error occurred loading this page. Try going back or reloading.

apiError.clientErrorSubtitle: The request could not be completed. Please try again.
apiError.notFoundSubtitle: The requested data could not be found.
apiError.serverErrorSubtitle: An internal error has occurred. Please reach out to @SFentonX if this does not resolve shortly.
apiError.serviceUnavailableSubtitle: The service is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
apiError.unknownSubtitle: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

songs.invalidScoreNoFallback: Because there is no valid other score for {{instrument}}, the {{instrument}} icon chip is red here.

songs.invalidScoreFilterHintSingle: You can also temporarily filter to '{{filterName}}' in the Filter modal.

songs.invalidScoreOverThresholdDetail: The {{instrument}} score shown exceeds the CHOpt maximum.

player.noScoresYetSubtitle: Play some songs on {{instrument}} to see your stats appear here.
player.topSongsPerInstrumentDesc: {{name}}'s highest and lowest-ranked competitive songs per instrument, sorted by percentile.
player.noBandsYetSubtitle: Band lineups will appear here once this player posts band scores.

player.bottomSongsDesc: {{name}}'s lowest-ranked competitive songs on {{instrument}}, sorted by percentile.
player.switchConfirmMessage: In order to see {{name}}'s scores, you will have to set them as your selected profile. Would you like to continue?

suggestions.noSuggestionsSubtitle: Select a player profile to get personalized suggestions.

near_fc_any.title: FC These Next!
near_fc_any.desc: If you can get gold stars, you can FC it!

near_fc_any_decade.title: FC These Next! ({{decade}})
near_fc_any_decade.desc: If you can get gold stars, you can FC it! Limited to {{decade}} songs.

near_fc_relaxed.title: Close to FC (92%+)
near_fc_relaxed.desc: Great runs to try and FC next!

near_fc_relaxed_decade.title: Close to FC (92%+) - {{decade}}
near_fc_relaxed_decade.desc: Great runs to try and FC next! Limited to {{decade}} songs.

almost_six_star.desc: Push these five-star runs to gold stars!

almost_six_star_decade.title: Push {{decade}} to Gold
almost_six_star_decade.desc: Push these five-star runs to gold stars! Limited to {{decade}} songs.

star_gains.title: Easy Star Gains
star_gains.desc: Hit a new high score to get even more stars on these songs!

star_gains_decade.title: Easy Star Gains ({{decade}})
star_gains_decade.desc: Hit a new high score to get even more stars on these songs! Limited to {{decade}} songs.

unfc_instrument.title: Finish the {{instrument}} FCs
unfc_instrument.desc: Play these songs again on {{instrument}} and grab an FC!

unfc_instrument_decade.title: Close {{instrument}} FCs ({{decade}})
unfc_instrument_decade.desc: Play these songs again on {{instrument}} and grab an FC! Limited to {{decade}} songs.

more_stars.title: Push These to Gold Stars
more_stars.desc: Try gold-starring this selection of tracks!

more_stars_decade.title: Push {{decade}} to Gold
more_stars_decade.desc: Try gold-starring this selection of tracks! Limited to {{decade}} songs.

unplayed_any.title: Try Something New
unplayed_any.desc: Songs you haven't played on any instrument yet.

unplayed_instrument.title: New on {{instrument}}
unplayed_instrument.desc: Songs you haven't played on {{instrument}} yet.

variety_pack.title: Variety Pack
variety_pack.desc: A mix of songs from different artists.

first_plays_mixed_decade.title: First Plays (Mixed {{decade}})
first_plays_mixed_decade.desc: Unplayed picks across instruments. Limited to {{decade}} songs.

samename.title: Songs Named '{{name}}'
samename.desc: Different tracks sharing the same title.

samename_nearfc.title: Close to FC: '{{name}}' Variants
samename_nearfc.desc: FC these same-name songs for a unique achievement!

almost_elite.title: Almost Elite
almost_elite.desc: You're in the top 5% on these — one good run could crack the top 1%.

almost_elite_decade.title: Almost Elite ({{decade}})
almost_elite_decade.desc: You're in the top 5% on these {{decade}} songs — one good run could crack the top 1%.

almost_elite_instrument.title: Almost Elite on {{instrument}}
almost_elite_instrument.desc: Your {{instrument}} scores are in the top 5% — push them into the top 1%.

almost_elite_instrument_decade.title: Almost Elite on {{instrument}} ({{decade}})
almost_elite_instrument_decade.desc: Your {{instrument}} scores on these {{decade}} songs are in the top 5% — push them into the top 1%.

pct_push.title: Percentile Push
pct_push.desc: These scores are close to the next percentile bracket — replay them to climb.

pct_push_decade.title: Percentile Push ({{decade}})
pct_push_decade.desc: These {{decade}} scores are close to the next percentile bracket — replay them to climb.

pct_push_instrument.title: Percentile Push: {{instrument}}
pct_push_instrument.desc: Replay these {{instrument}} songs to jump to the next percentile bracket.

pct_push_instrument_decade.title: Percentile Push: {{instrument}} ({{decade}})
pct_push_instrument_decade.desc: Replay these {{decade}} {{instrument}} songs to jump to the next percentile bracket.

stale_global.title: Untouched for {{seasons}} Season(s)
stale_global.desc: Songs you haven't played since {{seasons}} season(s) ago.

same_pct_improve.title: Competitive Improvements
same_pct_improve.desc: Songs where your percentile is the same across all instruments. An improvement on any instrument moves you up everywhere.

same_pct_bucket.title: Break Into {{target}}
same_pct_bucket.desc: Songs where all your instruments are ranked Top {{bucket}}%. Improve any instrument to break the tie and climb to {{target}}.

pct_improve_bucket.title: Top {{bucket}}% Push
pct_improve_bucket.desc: Songs with at least one instrument ranked Top {{bucket}}%. A small score bump could push you higher.

pct_improve_instrument_bucket.title: Top {{bucket}}% Push
pct_improve_instrument_bucket.desc: Songs with {{instrument}} scores ranked Top {{bucket}}%. A small score bump could push you higher.

improve_rankings_instrument.title: Improve {{instrument}} Rankings
improve_rankings_instrument.desc: A varied mix of {{instrument}} songs across different percentile brackets — all with room to grow.

song_rival_gap.title: Close the Gap vs {{rival}}
song_rival_gap.desc: Songs where {{rival}} barely leads you. One good run could overtake them.

song_rival_protect.title: Protect Your Lead vs {{rival}}
song_rival_protect.desc: You're barely ahead of {{rival}} on these. Don't let them pass you.

song_rival_battleground.title: Battleground Songs
song_rival_battleground.desc: Multiple rivals are clustered around your rank on these songs. Every position matters.

song_rival_spotlight.title: Rival Spotlight: {{rival}}
song_rival_spotlight.desc: A curated mix of your rivalry with {{rival}} — catches, defenses, and closest battles.

song_rival_slipping.title: {{rival}} is Pulling Ahead
song_rival_slipping.desc: {{rival}} has a big lead on these songs. Time to close the gap.

song_rival_dominate.title: Dominate {{rival}}
song_rival_dominate.desc: You're crushing {{rival}} on these. Keep up the dominance.

song_rival_near_fc.title: FC These to Beat {{rival}}!
song_rival_near_fc.desc: Almost FC songs where your rival also competes. Nail the combo to pull ahead.

song_rival_stale.title: Stale Songs Your Rivals Are Beating You On
song_rival_stale.desc: Songs you haven't touched in a while where rivals have pulled ahead.

song_rival_star_gains.title: Gain Stars & Beat {{rival}}
song_rival_star_gains.desc: Improving your star count on these would also overtake a rival.

song_rival_pct_push.title: Climb Past {{rival}}
song_rival_pct_push.desc: A percentile push on these would also move you past a rival.

near_max_5k.title: Almost Perfect (Within 5k)
near_max_5k.desc: Scores within 5,000 of the theoretical max. You're almost there!

near_max_5k_decade.title: Almost Perfect (Within 5k) ({{decade}})
near_max_5k_decade.desc: Scores within 5,000 of the theoretical max. Limited to {{decade}} songs.

near_max_10k.title: Close to Max (Within 10k)
near_max_10k.desc: Scores within 10,000 of the theoretical max. A great run could close the gap.

near_max_10k_decade.title: Close to Max (Within 10k) ({{decade}})
near_max_10k_decade.desc: Scores within 10,000 of the theoretical max. Limited to {{decade}} songs.

near_max_15k.title: Approaching Max (Within 15k)
near_max_15k.desc: Scores within 15,000 of the theoretical max. Keep pushing!

near_max_15k_decade.title: Approaching Max (Within 15k) ({{decade}})
near_max_15k_decade.desc: Scores within 15,000 of the theoretical max. Limited to {{decade}} songs.

suggestionFilterType.StarProgressDesc: Push five-star runs to gold, or gain more stars.
suggestionFilterType.VarietyPackDesc: A mix of songs from different artists.
suggestionFilterType.ArtistEssentialsDesc: A selection of songs by a single artist.
suggestionFilterType.ArtistDiscoverDesc: Unplayed songs from a single artist.
suggestionFilterType.SameNameDesc: Different tracks that share the same title.
suggestionFilterType.AlmostEliteDesc: Top 5% — one good run could crack the top 1%.
suggestionFilterType.PercentilePushDesc: Close to the next percentile bracket.
suggestionFilterType.StaleDesc: Songs you haven't played in a while.
suggestionFilterType.PctImproveDesc: Songs with room for percentile improvement.
suggestionFilterType.NearMaxScoreDesc: Songs close to the CHOpt theoretical max score.

settings.title: Settings
settings.appSettingsHint: General Festival Score Tracker app settings.
settings.showInstrumentIconsDesc: Display instrument icons on each song row showing which parts have leaderboard scores or FCs.
settings.enableVisualOrder: Enable Independent Song Row Visual Order
settings.enableVisualOrderDesc: When enabled, the metadata display order on song rows is controlled separately from sort priority. When disabled, metadata follows sort priority order.
settings.songRowVisualOrderHint: Drag to reorder metadata items on song rows.
settings.filterInvalidScoresDesc: Hide song scores that exceed the mathematical maximum by more than the leeway percentage.
settings.filterInvalidScoresToggleDesc: When enabled, the app will attempt to filter out invalid leaderboard values based on the maximum score derived from the CHOpt path.
settings.maxScoreLeewayDesc: This slider controls a percentage value that allows for some expanded range of scores to still be valid. For example, a CHOpt path with a max score of 100k and {{leeway}}% leeway will allow the app to accept scores up to {{maxScore}} as “valid”.
settings.songRowVisualOrderDesc: When filtering to a single instrument in the song list, extra metadata is displayed. Choose the order it appears in on the bottom row.
settings.pathDefaultViewDesc: Choose whether CHOpt paths open as an image or text table by default.
settings.pathColumnOrderDesc: Choose the order columns appear in the CHOpt text path view. You can also drag column headers directly in the path modal.
settings.showInstrumentsHint: Choose which instruments to display throughout the app.
settings.showMetadataHint: When filtering songs down to one instrument in the song list, extra metadata for that song can appear. Choose what you'd like to see in the song row here.
settings.experimentalRanksDesc: Enable this to see more ranking mechanisms in the Leaderboards page.
settings.showButtonsInHeaderMobileDesc: Shows the Quick Links, Select Player Profile, Song Rivals, and similar header text/buttons on mobile. Turn this off to hide them and free up screen space; these actions will still be available from the floating action button on supported pages.
settings.resetDescription: Restore all settings to their default values.
settings.resetConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to restore all settings to their default values?
settings.versionHint: Festival Score Tracker information to help with debugging.

history.title: Score History
history.noHistoryForInstrument: No score history for this instrument
history.selectPlayer: Select a player to view score history

shop.empty: No songs in the Item Shop
shop.emptyHint: Check back later — the shop updates regularly.

chart.selectBarHint: Select a bar to see more score details.
chart.rankHistoryHint: Your ranking progression over the past {{days}} days.

sort.modeHint: Choose which property to sort the song list by.
sort.resetHint: Restore sort mode, direction, and metadata priority to their defaults.
sort.cancelMessage: Are you sure you want to discard your sort changes?
sort.metadataPriorityHint: When two songs have the same value for the selected sort mode, songs are sorted by comparing these properties in order from top to bottom.
sort.metadataPriorityHintVisualOrder: When Enable Independent Song Row Visual Order is disabled in Settings, this also controls the order in which metadata is displayed in the song row (except for the primary sort field). To manually control visual order regardless of sort, go to App Settings and enable Enable Independent Song Row Visual Order, then order the song row metadata as you'd like to see it.
sort.instrumentOrderHint: Instruments are checked in this order when sorting by Has FC.
sort.filteredInstrumentHint: Filtering to a single instrument enables more sort options.
sort.title: Title

filter.resetHint: Restore all filter options to their defaults.
filter.cancelMessage: Are you sure you want to discard your filter changes?
filter.globalTogglesHint: Toggles that impact all instruments globally. Turning these on or off will enable or disable them across all instruments.
filter.individualTogglesHint: Toggles that impact individual instruments. These filters are computed per-instrument and then combined with other instruments.
filter.instrumentFiltersHint: Select an instrument to only show its metadata on each song row. When none is selected, all instruments are shown.
filter.seasonHint: Filter by the season in which the score was achieved.
filter.percentileHint: Show or hide songs based on their leaderboard ranking bracket.
filter.starsHint: Filter songs by the number of stars on your high score.
filter.intensityHint: Filter by the song's difficulty rating for the selected instrument.
filter.missingScoresDesc: Songs missing scores on all visible instruments.
filter.hasScoresDesc: Songs with scores on all visible instruments.
filter.missingFCsDesc: Songs missing FCs on all visible instruments.
filter.hasFCsDesc: Songs with FCs on all visible instruments.
filter.overThresholdDesc: Songs with scores above the configured CHOpt max score threshold in app settings.
filter.instrumentOverThresholdDesc: Songs with {{instrument}} scores above the configured CHOpt max score threshold in app settings.
filter.shopHint: Toggles that impact visibility of songs based on the current Item Shop rotation.
filter.shopInShopDesc: Songs that are available in the Item Shop today.
filter.shopLeavingTomorrowDesc: Songs that are leaving the Item Shop tomorrow.

suggestionsFilter.resetHint: Restore all suggestion filter options to their defaults.
suggestionsFilter.instrumentsHint: Choose which instruments appear in your suggestions.
suggestionsFilter.generalHint: Toggle broad suggestion types on or off.
suggestionsFilter.instrumentSpecificHint: Select an instrument to filter its suggestion types individually.
suggestionsFilter.cancelMessage: Are you sure you want to discard your suggestion filter changes?

paths.title: Paths
paths.unavailableMessage: Mic Mode, Pro Drums, and Pro Drums + Cymbals are not available for path visualization yet.

firstRun.demoSimulated: Some demo data may be simulated.

songList.title: Song List
songList.description: Browse and search the entire Festival library. Tap a song to see leaderboards and more details.

sort.title: Sort Songs
sort.description: Tap the sort button to reorder by default song data. Select a player profile to narrow it down even more.

navigation.title: Navigation
navigation.description: Use the sidebar or bottom tabs to switch between Songs, Suggestions, Statistics, and Settings.
navigation.descriptionMobile: Use the bottom tabs to navigate the app. Select a player profile to see even more options.
navigation.descriptionDesktop: Use the sidebar to navigate the app. Select a player profile to see even more options.

filter.title: Filter Songs
filter.description: Filter down the song list by global data, and refine it with per-instrument filters.

songIcons.title: Instrument Icons
songIcons.description: When showing all instruments, quickly identify songs you've FC'd (gold), played (green), or haven't played (red).

metadata.title: Song Metadata
metadata.description: When filtering to a single instrument, see more details about your best score. Customize the order, and what appears, in Settings.

shop.title: Item Shop Highlights
shop.description: Songs currently available in the Item Shop are highlighted with a pulsing glow so you can spot them at a glance.

leaving.title: Leaving Tomorrow
leaving.description: Songs about to leave the Item Shop pulse red so you know which ones to grab before they're gone.

drillDown.title: Drill Into Your Data
drillDown.description: Tap any stat card marked with a chevron to jump to the Songs page with pre-applied filters, instantly showing you all songs for that category.

overview.title: Global Statistics
overview.description: See a player's overall performance at a glance — songs played, full combos, gold stars, accuracy, and best rank. Tap any stat with an indicator to jump to the relevant songs.

instrumentBreakdown.title: Per-Instrument Stats
instrumentBreakdown.description: Scroll down to see detailed stats for each instrument, and tap to immediately be taken to a filtered list of songs for that instrument.

percentiles.title: Percentile Rankings
percentiles.description: See where a player ranks relative to all players. The percentile table breaks down how many scores land in each bracket — from Top 1% to Top 100%.

topSongs.title: Highest and Lowest Rank Breakdown
topSongs.description: Each instrument shows your highest and lowest five songs by percentile rank. Tap any song to see its leaderboard and score history.

selectProfile.title: Select Player Profile
selectProfile.descriptionMobile: Press the pulsing player profile button at the top of the screen, or the dedicated button inside the FAB menu, to select this player profile and see all of their tracked data.
selectProfile.descriptionDesktop: Press the Select Player Profile button at the top of the screen to select this player profile and see all of their tracked data.

overview.title: Personalized Suggestions
overview.description: Get tailored song suggestions based on your scores — find your best improvement opportunities, achievement gaps, and next milestones.

categoryCard.title: Suggestion Cards
categoryCard.description: Each suggestion is a themed card with songs tailored to what you have and haven't played — near FCs, unplayed tracks, percentile pushes, and more.

globalFilter.title: Filter Suggestions
globalFilter.description: Tap the filter button to control which suggestions are visible to you.

instrumentFilter.title: Per-Instrument Filters
instrumentFilter.description: Select an instrument to fine-tune which suggestion types appear for that specific instrument.

infiniteScroll.title: Endless Suggestions
infiniteScroll.description: Scroll down to load an endless rotation of personalized suggestions.

demo.unfcDesc: Play these songs again on Lead and grab an FC!
demo.pctPushDesc: Replay these Bass songs to jump to the next percentile bracket.
demo.staleDesc: Songs you haven't played on Tap Vocals this season.
demo.nearFcDesc: If you can get gold stars, you can FC it!
demo.unplayedDesc: Songs you haven't played on Drums yet.

settings.showFirstRunHint: Re-visit the first run experience for each page.

chart.title: Score History Chart
chart.description: When you have a player selected, their score history for this song appears at the top — charting accuracy and score over time. Change instruments to see more data!

barSelect.title: Select a Bar for Details
barSelect.description: Tap any bar on the chart to see the details for that score — date, season, score, and accuracy.

viewAll.title: View Player Scores
viewAll.description: Below the chart, the player's top scores are listed for quick reference. If there's more than five, tapping View all scores will take you to the player history page, where you can see all tracked history for that user, score, and instrument.

topScores.title: Top Scores Per Instrument
topScores.description: Each instrument shows the top leaderboard entries for this song. Tap any player to go to their page, or "View full leaderboard" to go to the instrument leaderboard for the selected song.

paths.title: Optimal Paths
paths.descriptionMobile: Tap "View Paths" in the action button to see the optimal score path for any instrument and difficulty.
paths.descriptionDesktop: Tap "View Paths" in the header to see the optimal score path for any instrument and difficulty.

shop.title: Item Shop Link
shop.descriptionMobile: When a song is in the Item Shop, a shop icon appears on the song card. Tap it to go straight to the store.
shop.descriptionDesktop: When a song is in the Item Shop, an Item Shop button appears in the header. Tap it to go straight to the store.

leaving.title: Leaving Tomorrow
leaving.descriptionMobile: When a song is about to leave the Item Shop, the shop icon turns red so you know to act fast.
leaving.descriptionDesktop: When a song is about to leave the Item Shop, the Item Shop button turns red so you know to act fast.

scoreList.title: Score History
scoreList.description: Every tracked score change for this song and instrument is listed here. Your personal best is highlighted so you can spot it at a glance.

sort.title: Sort Scores
sort.descriptionMobile: Tap the sort button in the action menu to reorder by date, score, accuracy, or season — ascending or descending.
sort.descriptionDesktop: Tap the sort button in the header to reorder by date, score, accuracy, or season — ascending or descending.

overview.title: Global Rankings
overview.description: See how players rank across all songs on each instrument. Rankings are computed after every scrape pass.

experimentalMetrics.title: Experimental Ranking Metrics
experimentalMetrics.description: Sort by Adjusted Skill, Weighted Rating, FC Rate, or Max Score %. These metrics use statistical formulas and may not perfectly reflect skill — tap the ? icon on any metric for details.

yourRank.title: Your Rank
yourRank.description: Your position appears in purple. Tap 'View all rankings' to see the full leaderboard for any instrument.

how.title: How Adjusted Skill Works
how.description: Your rank on each song becomes a percentile. Your rating is the average across all songs — lower is better.

experience.title: Why Playing More Songs Helps
experience.description: With few songs, you're unproven. Play more to let your true skill shine through.

hood.title: Under the Hood
hood.description: The formula blends your real average with a 50% starting point. More songs = more weight on your actual performance.

experimental.title: Why It's Experimental
experimental.description: All songs count equally regardless of difficulty, and the experience threshold is a tuning choice.

how.title: How Weighted Rating Works
how.description: Like Adjusted Skill, but songs with more players carry more weight.

experience.title: Why Playing More Songs Helps
experience.description: Same experience boost — new players start near 50% and converge toward their true rating.

hood.title: Under the Hood
hood.description: Each song is weighted by its player count before averaging. Then the same experience adjustment applies.

experimental.title: Why It's Experimental
experimental.description: More players doesn't mean harder. The logarithmic weighting is a subjective choice.

how.title: How FC Rate Works
how.description: The percentage of songs you Full Combo'd — hitting every note without breaking your streak.

experience.title: Why Playing More Songs Helps
experience.description: A perfect record on 2 songs isn't as trustworthy as consistent FCs across 100.

hood.title: Under the Hood
hood.description: Same experience formula — your real FC rate blended with the 50% starting point.

experimental.title: Why It's Experimental
experimental.description: Easy FCs count the same as hard ones, and near-misses aren't distinguished from total failures.

how.title: How Max Score % Works
how.description: For each song, how close your score is to the computed theoretical maximum.

experience.title: Why Playing More Songs Helps
experience.description: A few near-perfect scores aren't as proven as consistent accuracy across many songs.

hood.title: Under the Hood
hood.description: Scores are capped at 105% per song to limit the impact of inaccurate maximums.

experimental.title: Why It's Experimental
experimental.description: The computed maximum isn't always perfect, and new songs may temporarily lack data.

hub.title: Compete Hub
hub.description: Your competitive snapshot — see your leaderboard rankings and closest rivals at a glance.

leaderboards.title: Leaderboards
leaderboards.description: The top-ranked players across all instruments. Tap to explore the full global rankings.

rivals.title: Rivals
rivals.description: See who's just ahead and behind you. Tap to view all your rivals and head-to-head matchups.

overview.title: Your Rivals
overview.description: Rivals are players near your skill level on each instrument. See who's just above and below you.

instruments.title: Per-Instrument Rivals
instruments.description: Each instrument has its own rival list — plus a common rivals section for players who appear across multiple instruments.

detail.title: Head-to-Head
detail.description: Tap a rival to see a song-by-song comparison, broken down by closest battles, almost passed, and more.

overview.title: Item Shop
overview.description: Browse the songs currently available for purchase in the Item Shop.

views.title: Grid & List View
views.description: Switch between a visual grid of album art and a compact list — tap the toggle in the header.

highlighting.title: Shop Highlighting
highlighting.description: Songs from the Item Shop are highlighted with a pulsing glow on the Songs page so you can spot them at a glance.

leaving.title: Leaving Tomorrow
leaving.description: Songs about to leave the Item Shop pulse red — in the grid, list, and on the Songs page — so you never miss a last-chance purchase.

rivals.title: Rivals
rivals.noPlayer: Track a player to see their rivals.
rivals.noRivals: Not enough data to identify rivals yet.
rivals.noRivalsSubtitleSingle: Play more songs on your selected instrument to generate a roster of Rivals.
rivals.noRivalsSubtitlePlural: Play more songs on your selected instruments to generate a roster of Rivals.
rivals.noRivalsCombo: No rivals found for this instrument combination.

detail.closestBattlesDesc: Songs where you and your rival are neck and neck.
detail.almostPassedDesc: You're just behind — one good run could flip these.
detail.slippingAwayDesc: They're pulling further ahead on these songs.
detail.barelyWinningDesc: You're just ahead — don't let them catch up.
detail.pullingForwardDesc: You have a solid lead on these songs.
detail.dominatingThemDesc: You're far ahead — these are your strongest matchups.
detail.noSongs: No song data for this rival.

rankings.title: Leaderboards
rankings.noRankingsSubtitle: When leaderboard ranks are recomputed for {{instrument}}, they will show up here on the next update.
rankings.noRankingsHint: Rankings are computed after each scrape pass.
rankings.rankByCancelMessage: You have unsaved changes to the ranking metric. Discard them?
rankings.instrumentHint: Choose which instrument's leaderboard to view.
rankings.instrumentCancelMessage: You have unsaved changes to the instrument selection. Discard them?

metric.adjustedDesc: Average percentile across all songs, adjusted for credibility.
metric.weightedDesc: Percentile weighted by number of leaderboard entries per song, adjusted for credibility.
metric.fcrateDesc: Percentage of played songs with a full combo, adjusted for credibility.
metric.totalscoreDesc: Sum of all scores across every played song.
metric.maxscoreDesc: Percentage of the maximum possible score achieved, adjusted for credibility.

compete.title: Compete
compete.noRivals: Track a player to see your closest rivals
